calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Distribution Of Surplus Funds To Chase Bank U.S.A.
Off Calendar Apr-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Vivian Lerche, Esq. (415-680-5731) specially appearing for Claimant/Moving party Angel Cruz.
Jason Savlov, Esq. (714-277-4867) for Claimant/Moving party Chase Bank through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

The Court announces the reasons for the hearing required. Hearing is held. Both Claimants Argued. Counsel for Chase bank claiming $87,168.66. Counsel for Chase Bank to reach out to Franchis Tax Board regarding amount. Counsel for Cruz states amount for Claimant Cruz will be the amount remaining after Chase and FTB. Counsel for Chase states the amount being divided is $302,374.01. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

CLAIMANT CHASE BANK USA, N.A., F/K/A CHASE MANHATTAN BANK, Notice Of Motion And Motion For Distribution Of Surplus Funds To Chase Bank U.S.A. is Granted. Counsel for Chase Bank to submit proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b) and leave the amounts blank. Proposed order must come with a cover letter indicating the amounts and priority for Chase, FTB and Angel Cruz. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)

Hearing On Claim To Surplus Funds Re: Franchise Tax Board On September 1, 2015
Off Calendar Apr-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Vivian Lerche, Esq. (415-680-5731) specially appearing for Claimant/Moving party Angel Cruz.
Jason Savlov, Esq. (714-277-4867) for Claimant/Moving party Chase Bank through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

The Court announces the reasons for the hearing required. Hearing is held. Both Claimants Argued. Counsel for Chase bank claiming $87,168.66. Counsel for Chase Bank to reach out to Franchis Tax Board regarding amount. Counsel for Cruz states amount for Claimant Cruz will be the amount remaining after Chase and FTB. Counsel for Chase states the amount being divided is $302,374.01. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Hearing On Claim To Surplus Funds Re: Franchise Tax Board On September 1, 2015 is Granted. Counsel for Chase Bank to submit proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b) and leave the amounts blank. Proposed order must come with a cover letter indicating the amounts and priority for Chase, FTB and Angel Cruz. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)

Claimant/Defendant Angel Cruz'S Notice Of Statement Of Claim To Surplus Funds By Trustor Pursuant To His Interest Under California Civil Code 2924k(A)(4)
Off Calendar Apr-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Vivian Lerche, Esq. (415-680-5731) specially appearing for Claimant/Moving party Angel Cruz.
Jason Savlov, Esq. (714-277-4867) for Claimant/Moving party Chase Bank through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

The Court announces the reasons for the hearing required. Hearing is held. Both Claimants Argued. Counsel for Chase bank claiming $87,168.66. Counsel for Chase Bank to reach out to Franchis Tax Board regarding amount. Counsel for Cruz states amount for Claimant Cruz will be the amount remaining after Chase and FTB. Counsel for Chase states the amount being divided is $302,374.01. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Claimant/Defendant Angel Cruz'S Notice Of Statement Of Claim To Surplus Funds By Trustor Pursuant To His Interest Under California Civil Code 2924k(A)(4)

Granted. Counsel for Chase Bank to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b) and leave the amounts blank. Order must come with a cover letter indicating the amounts and priority for Chase, FTB and Angel Cruz.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Distribution Of Surplus Funds To Chase Bank U.S.A.
Off Calendar Apr-04-2016 Continued To Apr-28-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq. (415) specially appearing for Claimant Angel Cruz.
No other Appearance.

Defendant does not contest the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CLAIMANT CHASE BANK USA, N.A., F/K/A CHASE MANHATTAN BANK's Motion For Distribution Of Surplus Funds To Chase Bank U.S.A. is continued to April 28, 2016. Moving party to provide courtesy copies of its claim and motion. Additionally, the clerk of the Court will set the claims of Franchise Tax Board and Angel Cruz for hearing for April 28, 2016. Any opposition to the claims must be filed and served no later than April 19, 2016. Reply, if any, shall be filed and served no later than April 25, 2016. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Claimant'S Hearing For Disbursement Of Surplus Funds
Off Calendar Jan-14-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

Claimant'S Hearing For Disbursement Of Surplus Funds is OFF CALENDAR, the surplus funds have not yet been deposited with the Court. The hearing will be re-set after the deposit is made.
Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Distribution Of Surpluus Funds To Chase Bank Usa
Off Calendar Jan-07-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances: The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

CLAIMANT CHASE BANK USA, N.A., F/K/A CHASE MANHATTAN BANK, Notice Of Motion And Motion For Distribution Of Surpluus Funds To Chase Bank Usa is OFF CALENDAR, the surplus funds have not yet been deposited with the Court. The hearing will be re-set after the deposit is made.
Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)
